description: Hospital information management system with patient records, appointments, billing, and audit logging

modules.name: HospitalApp
modules.description: Root project directory for hospital management system

modules.name: Backend
modules.description: Core backend business logic and data management

functions.name: auth_login
functions.signature: int auth_login(const char *username, const char *password, SessionInfo *session)

functions.name: auth_create_user
functions.signature: int auth_create_user(const char *username, const char *password, const char *role, const char *admin_token)

functions.name: auth_modify_user
functions.signature: int auth_modify_user(const char *username, const char *new_password, const char *new_role, const char *admin_token)

functions.name: auth_get_user_role
functions.signature: int auth_get_user_role(const char *username, char *role, int max_len)

functions.name: auth_create_session
functions.signature: int auth_create_session(const char *username, const char *role, SessionInfo *session)

files.name: patient_manager
files.description: Patient record creation, retrieval, updating, and search operations

functions.name: patient_create
functions.signature: int patient_create(const char *first_name, const char *last_name, const char *dob, const char *gender, const char *phone, const char *address, const char *city, const char *state, const char *zip, const char *country, char *patient_id)

functions.name: patient_update_info
functions.signature: int patient_update_info(const char *patient_id, const char *username, const char *field, const char *new_value)

functions.name: patient_search_by_name
functions.signature: int patient_search_by_name(const char *first_name, const char *last_name, HL7_PID **results, int *count)

files.name: appointment_manager
files.description: Appointment scheduling, rescheduling, cancellation, and listing

functions.name: appointment_book
functions.signature: int appointment_book(const char *patient_id, const char *scheduled_date, const char *scheduled_time, const char *doctor_name, const char *appointment_type, const char *notes, const char *username, char *appointment_id)

functions.name: appointment_reschedule
functions.signature: int appointment_reschedule(const char *appointment_id, const char *new_date, const char *new_time, const char *username)

functions.name: appointment_cancel
functions.signature: int appointment_cancel(const char *appointment_id, const char *reason, const char *username)

files.name: billing_manager
files.description: Invoice creation, payment recording, and billing report generation

functions.name: billing_create_invoice
functions.signature: int billing_create_invoice(const char *patient_id, const char *procedure_code, const char *procedure_desc, double charge_amount, const char *username, char *invoice_id)

functions.name: billing_record_payment
functions.signature: int billing_record_payment(const char *invoice_id, double payment_amount, const char *payment_method, const char *reference_id, const char *username)

functions.name: billing_void_invoice
functions.signature: int billing_void_invoice(const char *invoice_id, const char *reason, const char *admin_token)

files.name: audit_logger
files.description: Audit trail logging for compliance and change tracking

functions.name: audit_log_action
functions.signature: int audit_log_action(const char *patient_id, const char *username, const char *action, const char *field, const char *old_value, const char *new_value, const char *reason)

functions.name: audit_log_system_action
functions.signature: int audit_log_system_action(const char *username, const char *action, const char *details)

functions.name: audit_get_patient_history
functions.signature: int audit_get_patient_history(const char *patient_id, const char *start_date, const char *end_date, AuditEntry **entries, int *entry_count)

functions.name: audit_get_user_actions
functions.signature: int audit_get_user_actions(const char *username, const char *start_date, const char *end_date, AuditEntry **entries, int *entry_count)

functions.name: audit_export_to_csv
functions.signature: int audit_export_to_csv(const char *filename, AuditEntry *entries, int entry_count)

files.name: hl7_parser
files.description: HL7 medical data format parsing for segments (MSH, PID, OBX, SCH, UB1)

functions.name: extract_field
functions.signature: int extract_field(const char *line, int field_num, char *output, int max_len)

functions.name: parse_hl7_message
functions.signature: int parse_hl7_message(const char *message, const char *segment_type, void *output_struct)

files.name: utils
files.description: Utility functions for file operations, validation, and logging

functions.name: split_string
functions.signature: int split_string(char *str, const char *delimiter, char **fields, int max_fields)

modules.name: UI
modules.description: User interface components (GTK+ based, partially implemented)

modules.name: Data
modules.description: Data storage directories for runtime data

dataStructures.name: SessionInfo
dataStructures.purpose: User session information with token, role, and expiry

dataStructures.name: PatientRecord
dataStructures.purpose: Complete patient data combining HL7 segments
